name: Potato Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg yolks to the mixture and stir gently.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, cocoa, and baking powder) into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture alternately with milk, mixing on low speed after each addition until just combined.
5. Add mashed potatoes to the batter and stir in chopped nuts.
6. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites until no large lumps remain.
7. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius) for about 30-40 minutes, or until firm and golden brown on top.
